text: That's amazing! I'm so thrilled for you!
turn_2: I got the promotion I've been working towards for two years!

text: I can't believe they did that to you. That's really unfair.
turn_2: Terrible. My boss took credit for my entire project in front of the CEO.

text: Yeah, sure, I'll check it out later.
turn_1: Have you seen the new restaurant downtown?
turn_2: They have great pizza. We should go sometime.

text: I miss her so much. The house feels so empty now.
turn_2: It's been hard since grandma passed. Every little thing reminds me of her.

text: Seriously?! You had ONE job! How could you mess this up?
turn_1: Did you submit the report on time?
turn_2: Actually, I forgot and the deadline was yesterday.

text: OMG yes!! This is the best birthday surprise ever!!
turn_1: Close your eyes and don't peek!
turn_2: Okay, you can open them now. Happy birthday!

text: I just feel so lost. Nothing seems to matter anymore.
turn_1: You've been quiet lately. Everything okay?
turn_2: I didn't get into any of the graduate programs I applied to.

text: Stop making excuses! You always do this and I'm sick of it!
turn_1: Why didn't you come to the dinner last night?
turn_2: I'm sorry, something came up at the last minute.

text: Okay, sounds good. Let me know when you're free.
turn_1: Want to study together for the final?
turn_2: Sure, maybe this weekend? I need to check my schedule first.

text: Haha that's hilarious! You always know how to make me laugh!
turn_1: You look stressed, let me tell you something funny.
turn_2: So my cat literally knocked my laptop off the table right before my Zoom meeting started.
